Source_Reference.reference: LLM1_text_extracted: The Photonic Fence Monitoring Device (PFMD) is portable, with a mass of 7kg, capable of being moved and hoisted onto a tripod by one person. The device includes a touchscreen monitor (Corkea 14 Inch Touchscreen Display T140A) as a recommended accessory, which suggests that operational indications may be visible from the exterior. The onboard user experience is described as minimal, intended for data-gathering setup and troubleshooting, and the web app includes dashboards and visualization tools. There is mention of a self-test to be executed by the customer at the customer site, implying some form of indication or display accessible externally.

Items.field: Changing the setting changes the indication

Source_Reference.reference: LLM1_text_extracted: Adjust illumination levels to match the configuration of the experimental scene. The illumination adjustment dialog box is accessed using the SETTINGS button. The goal is to manipulate the Brightness slider for each camera until the portion of interest within each image (left and right) is adequately bright. A specified Region of Interest can be used to exclude areas of the scene which are not germane to the experiment. Setting the Region of Interest is accomplished using the ROI toggle and subsequently adjusting the green rectangular ROI box for each camera independently.

Ambient Temperature: Operational 5°C - 45°C, Storage -20°C - 60°C

Moisture Resistance: Indoor/outdoor, high humidity and rain
Dust Protected: Protected from limited dust ingress
IP54 Rated
Electrical Power: 48VDC input; 110V - 240V adapter included
Network: RJ-45 ethernet port
Human Interface Devices: 1 x HDMI, 1 x USB-2, USB-2 hub included
External Storage: 1 x USB-3 port

LLM1_text_extracted: The PFMD may be placed on the floor if that is the optimal vantage point. The viewing angle can be adjusted using the tilting mechanism on the front face of the device; use the clamping lever to release and secure the tilting mechanism. Alternatively, the PFMD may be placed on any sturdy surface large enough to support the four rubberized feet on the base of the device. The PFMD was designed to support several mounting configurations. When carrying the PFMD outside of its packaging, please support it using both handles on the lid of the device. The handles can be folded flat against the lid when not in use.

LLM1_text_extracted: The Photonic Fence Monitoring Device (PFMD) is powered by a 48VDC input with a 110V - 240V adapter included in the kit. The PFMD is grounded through the grounding conductor in the power cord, which must be connected to earth ground. The device is capable of being moved and hoisted onto a tripod by one person, with a mass of 7kg. The kit includes a free-standing frame for mounting the retroreflective screen. There is no explicit mention of permanent connection to mains supply or fixed installation in the provided text.

Source_Reference.reference: LLM1_text_extracted: General Safety Precautions include: Only qualified personnel should perform service. Use only the power cord specified for this product and certified for the country of use. The PFMD is grounded through the grounding conductor in the power cord. To avoid electric shock, the grounding conductor must be connected to earth ground. Do not operate the PFMD with any covers removed. Keep product surfaces clean and dry.
